title: Johannes Kepler
ground_truth_corrupted_sentence: By the time Johannes was born, the Kepler family fortune had already begun to recover.
guessed_corrupted_sentence: His parents were Lutheran, but it is presumed that he was baptized a Catholic, as Protestant baptisms were not permitted in Weil at that time.

parsed_response.corrupted_sentence: His parents were Lutheran, but it is presumed that he was baptized a Catholic, as Protestant baptisms were not permitted in Weil at that time.
parsed_response.explanation: This sentence is incorrect. Johannes Kepler was born to a Lutheran family and was raised Protestant; he later entered the Tübinger Stift, a Lutheran seminary, to train as a Lutheran pastor. Sources indicate Kepler was baptized and brought up in the Protestant (Lutheran) tradition, so the claim that he was presumably baptized a Catholic because Protestant baptisms were not permitted in Weil is not supported by standard biographies and is inconsistent with his later Lutheran education and career.
